concept: FadeChat: A supercharged, polished temporary private chatting platform. The UI balances intense neon cyberpunk aesthetics with grounded, matte black 'stealth' elements. It visualizes security (E2E encryption, masking) through technical, precision-driven components.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol. Use 'Control Room' mode for the dashboard (dense, tight gaps like gap-4). Use 'Tetris' grid for login/landing pages (asymmetric, gap-8).
spacing_and_layout.chat_layout: Minimalist chat layout. Bottom navigation for mobile. Split-screen docking for desktop.
spacing_and_layout.optical_alignment: Ensure icons and text align perfectly, specifically using padding tweaks for round elements.

surface_strategies.cards: Retro-Futurism: Deep black background, subtle neon border (border-white/10 or border-primary/30), optional scanlines overlay.
surface_strategies.glassmorphism: Used for sticky headers/modals: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10. No muddy gray transparency.
surface_strategies.screenshot_protection: CSS noise overlay spanning the entire viewport (pointer-events-none, mix-blend-overlay, opacity-20) to distort screenshots.
surface_strategies.chat_bubbles: High contrast: Sent messages use subtle gradient or solid matte black with neon cyan border. Received messages use dark gray. Add 1px borders.

components.buttons: Flat backgrounds. Primary buttons: bg-primary text-black font-bold. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-primary hover:text-primary transition-colors.
components.inputs: Shadcn heavily customized. bg-transparent, bottom border only or 1px border-white/10, focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50.
components.security_indicators: High-contrast utility elements. Red/orange for self-destruct timers. Green/Cyan for E2E encryption and masked IPs.
components.room_themes: Custom selector allowing users to switch primary neon accent (Cyan, Magenta, Green).

animations.general: Smooth transitions. Use framer-motion for route changes.
animations.micro_interactions: Hover scaling (scale-105), subtle glow expansion (box-shadow on hover).
animations.chat_messages: Staggered entrance animations (fade up and slide in).

3d_and_effects.usage: Use R3F for interactive 3D avatars in profiles, or floating 3D chat bubbles/security nodes in empty states. Use TSParticles for a secure network node background effect on the login screen.
3d_and_effects.lighting: Cinematic dark lighting in 3D scenes. Use ambientLight (low intensity) + pointLight (colored neon) to match the dark theme.

abstract_bg_1.description: Dark matte black 3D abstract background with neon cyan/purple wireframes
abstract_bg_1.usage: Login screen background, Settings background, or Empty Chat State background

avatar_1.description: 3D hacker avatar with glowing cyan mask

avatar_3.usage: Room icon, Encryption secure node visual

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Write all React components in .js (JSX) files, NOT .tsx files. Use standard JavaScript.
Install Google Fonts 'Unbounded' and 'IBM Plex Sans' and 'JetBrains Mono' via CSS imports or layout head.
Configure tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (background: #050505, surface: #111111, primary: #00F0FF, etc.) and fonts.
Implement the UI using Shadcn components (using JS, not TS), but deeply customize them to remove the Vercel/light theme default look. Apply black backgrounds with 1px white/10 borders.
Build the Auth/Login screen with the abstract_bg_1 image as a background or side panel.
Create the Dashboard utilizing a dense Bento Grid (Control Room mode) for creating/joining rooms and displaying security statuses (IP Masking, E2E status).
Develop the Chat Interface featuring message auto-destruction timers (circular countdowns) and encrypted file/voice sharing components.
Implement 'Screenshot Protection' via a fixed overlay with CSS noise and mix-blend-mode.
Integrate React Three Fiber (R3F) for visual flair: for example, an interactive 3D crystal (avatar_3 concept) as a loading state, or floating chat bubbles on the landing page.
Ensure ALL interactive and key informational elements have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='send-message-btn').
Incorporate Framer Motion for micro-interactions (hover states, modal popping, staggered message lists).
NEVER use placeholder images; rely solely on the provided URLs in this JSON.
